title: Oxidizing Copper Equipment
description: Copper TOOLS + ARMOR oxidize as they are used.
body:
_(Want more Copper Age content? Check out [**Tuff Copper Golems**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tuff-copper-golems)!)_ Copper blocks oxidize and change color over time, so why not the new tools and gear? ## Features: - **All Copper Tools and Armor** items and **Brushes** oxidize depending on their **durability level**. - Armor oxidizes when worn with OptiFine, Variants-CIT or other CIT mods. Armor displaying different textures depending on durability is currently not supported in vanilla, requiring the use of such mods for this feature. This pack is compatible with my [**Consistent Helmets**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-helmets) resource pack, which adjusts the Helmet item textures to be consistent with their models. To use both, make sure to have this pack selected BELOW the Consistent Helmets pack.
